articles.title: The long-awaited “Interchain Era” begins on Cosmos (ATOM)
articles.description: The highly anticipated inter-blockchain communication (IBC) protocol transfers have gone live on Cosmos (ATOM), allowing users to transfer their tokens between different decentralized networks, its developers announced today. The post The long-awaited “Interchain Era” begins on Cosmos (ATOM) appeared first on CryptoSlate.

articles.title: Visa Starts Settling USDC Stablecoin Payments on the Ethereum Blockchain: Report
articles.description: Payments giant Visa has announced it is now settling payments in the USDC stablecoin on the Ethereum blockchain, becoming the first major payments network to use a stablecoin as a settlement currency. articles.title: Price analysis 3/29: BTC, ETH, BNB, ADA, DOT, XRP, UNI, THETA, LTC, LINK
articles.description: Bitcoin’s renewed push above the descending channel trendline suggests bulls are preparing to push BTC and altcoins to new highs.

articles.title: Cosmos Adds Interoperability, Sending ATOM Higher
articles.description: Cosmos has expanded interoperability with other blockchains, pushing the price of ATOM through a crucial resistance barrier. articles.title: Kusama flips legacy projects EOS and TRON as parachain auctions launch draws near
articles.description: Thanks to solid price momentum, Kusama has overtaken legacy projects such as TRON and EOS recently.

articles.title: Binance Smart Chain Integrates Wrapped IOTA to Stake, Yield, and Earn
articles.description: IOTA holders will be able to stake, yield, earn, and participate in more applications on the Binance Smart Chain through wrapped IOTA.

articles.title: Bitcoin-Based ID Solution by Microsoft: Pros and Cons According to IOTA's Developer
articles.description: Jelle Millenaar, Lead of Identity at IOTA Foundation, shares his take on latest digital identity system by Microsoft, ION. Is this competitor dangerous for IOTA's DID?

articles.title: The Internet of Blockchains Is Now Live on Cosmos
articles.description: After five years of research and development, the industry’s first cross-chain technology, Inter-Blockchain Communication (IBC), is being rolled out onto the Cosmos Hub. Internet of Blockchains Comes to Life Cosmos is a decentralized network composed of multiple independent parallel blockchains, each using the Tendermint BFT, a Proof-of-Stake consensus protocol. articles.title: Users Can Now Book Flights With Dogecoin (DOGE) on AirBaltic
articles.description: AirBaltic customers wanting to buy flight tickets can do so now using Dogecoin (DOGE), Ethereum (ETH), and Bitcoin Cash (BCH).

articles.title: Visa To Begin Accepting Cryptocurrency To Settle Transactions On Its Payment Network
articles.description: Visa has today announced that it has successfully processed a USDC payment directly on the ethereum blockchain using crypto stablecoin USDC. The payments giant plans to introduce this new capability to its partners later this year. Bitcoin is back above $58,000 in the wake of the Visa news. Visa Leverages Ethereum To Process Cryptocurrency Payments […]

articles.title: Visa Picks Ethereum Over Facebook Libra to Settle Payments; ETH/USD Up
articles.description: Ether, the de-facto settlement token of the Ethereum blockchain, rallied on Monday after global payment giant Visa became the ledger’s latest supporter. articles.description: The giant US multinational financial services corporation, Visa, will use USD Coin (USDC) to settle transactions on top of Ethereum.

articles.title: Visa to Accept Cryptocurrencies for Payment Settlements
articles.description: According to Reuters, Visa announced today that it will begin accepting cryptocurrency USD Coin (USDC) to settle transactions on its payment network. The move by the fintech giant coincides with the growing institutional acceptance of digital currencies. The company has launched a pilot payment program with Crypto.com, and plans to roll out its services to various partners later this year. ...

articles.title: VISA to allow USDC settlements via Ethereum on its network
articles.description: Visa now settles payments in the USDC stablecoin on the Ethereum blockchain. Visa's settlement agent for the USDC capability is Anchorage.

articles.title: Visa now settles payments in USDC stablecoin on Ethereum blockchain
articles.description: Visa now settles payments in the USDC stablecoin on the Ethereum blockchain. Visa's settlement agent for the USDC capability is Anchorage. The post Visa now settles payments in USDC stablecoin on Ethereum blockchain appeared first on The Block.

articles.title: Visa Will Start Settling Transactions With Crypto Partners In USDC On Ethereum
articles.description: Visa unveils an upgrade to its settlement system. The company’s crypto partners will soon be able to settle their obligations with Visa in USDC on the Ethereum blockchain.

articles.title: Visa plans to allow partners to settle fiat transactions with crypto
